single_next_goal: Prevent missing dock inbound provider declarations from crashing AFK prompt construction before existing structured guard receipts can run.

review_finding.summary: providerPromptProfile calls validateDockInboundMessage for any supported provider/dock. Because current dock contracts only declare codex, supported non-Codex providers such as claude/operator now throw before the existing structured pre-launch guard receipt can run.

clipboard_prompt: follow the transfer packet in .docks/foreman/packets/to-gdi-afk-dock-inbound-contract-missing-provider-correction-v0.json; start from gdi/afk-dock-inbound-contract-prompt-source-v0 at ceaf38ef267c20b1f8f3ffd6d4db39a8d7ca64ad
required_evidence: Missing provider declaration in a dock inbound contract is handled as structured prompt-contract evidence, not an uncaught exception from buildLiveProviderPrompt/buildAttemptContext
Existing unsupported or unsupported-for-live provider guard receipts keep returning structured JSON in the established stdout/stderr shape expected by tests
Codex/GDI contract-backed prompt behavior remains unchanged
Contract-declared GDI self-acceptance errors still block before typed input
Regression test covers a supported non-Codex provider/dock combination whose contract provider is absent, such as claude/operator, without crashing before guard classification
Statement that no live provider launch, real terminal drive, transcript body read, provider mutation, GitHub mutation, async routing, or unsupervised trigger behavior occurred
stop_conditions: repo-mode TCC/Input Monitoring readiness blocks after the standard GDI helper
implementation requires driving real dock terminals or launching live providers
implementation requires provider transcript body reads or provider-owned store mutation
implementation requires gateway/broker, Slack, GitHub, Foreman inbox, notifier route mutation, async result routing, or removing --i-am-present
the right fix requires adding full Claude/Gemini dock inbound provider contracts instead of preserving current Codex-only semantics
human_notes: The reviewed implementation is directionally right but not accepted yet.
After this correction is accepted, Foreman should route the Agent Terminal headful observability design/contract slice.
